blurb: Economics consultancy with an AI practice; launch coverage uses first-party AI competition-policy analysis.

hiring.note: Official Frontier Economics careers page; bespoke/manual search required for policy-relevant roles.

publications.title: Out of the clouds: the downstream focus for AI in 2025
publications.summary: Frontier Economics argues the competitive focus in AI is shifting downstream, from building the most capable models to deployment, distribution and regulator-facing market structure questions.

publications.title: AI regulation: harnessing the benefits and mitigating the risks
publications.summary: Frontier Economics discusses economic trade-offs in AI regulation, including high-risk AI restrictions and market-value effects.

publications.title: AI adoption: healthcare or health scare?
publications.summary: Frontier Economics argues clear regulatory frameworks can support AI adoption in healthcare by clarifying standards, liability and trust.
